channel.title: Sound Sessions Journal | Retail Music Strategy
channel.description: Research-backed insights on retail music strategy, in-store customer behavior, and AI-powered audio optimization.

item.title: Healing from Breakups
item.description: A sound session in Denver for people carrying the end of a relationship. First date coming.

item.title: Blog
item.description: Writing on sound, rooms, and what people put down in them. From the producer behind Denver sound sessions.
